DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Wallace E. Smith, (415)743-2227 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Frank Leung.
DAvid Semel, (510)625-0100 for Defendants/Moving parties Gang Lun Wong and Siu Ying.

Argued by counsel for Defendants. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GANG WONG, SIU WONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges declaratory and injunctive relief. Defendant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. (Defendant failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
